Hi,

This patch updates intel-pcm to the latest release from github.
Also as an open discussion, I'm stil wondering why there's a intel-pcm-devel verison in the tree, it seems double to me. There are no betas or such that the -devel version can track (IIRC).

Synth test was fine and portlint is fine too.

Regards,
Dries
